title: Fix MongoDB Projection to Ignore Embedded Fields with Optional Keys

statement.markdown: In this task, you will fix a MongoDB projection function to ignore embedded fields when their parent keys are optional. The function should return a projection that only includes the specified fields from the input document, ignoring any unnecessary fields, including those embedded in optional key fields.
statement.inputFormat: Input document is an object with nested properties. Each property may have an optional 'key' property that denotes its embedded status.
statement.outputFormat: A MongoDB projection object that only includes the specified fields from the input document.
statement.notes: You can assume the input document is a valid JSON object. The function should handle cases where the input document has optional keys with embedded fields.

constraints.description: Maximum depth of nested fields in the input document
Maximum number of fields in the output projection

examples.explanation: The function should ignore the field 'f' and its nested field 'g:h' since their parent keys are optional
The function should ignore the field 'w' and its nested field 'u' since their parent keys are optional

hints.text: First hint text: Handle optional keys by checking if the parent key exists in the document

editorial.title: Editorial title
editorial.intuition: Explanation of the correct approach: Use recursion to traverse the document and handle optional keys
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach summary: Iterate through each field in the document and check if it's a parent key
editorial.betterSolution: Better solution explanation: Use a recursive function to handle nested fields and optional keys
editorial.optimalSolution: Optimal solution details: Implement a recursive function that checks for optional keys and ignores unnecessary fields
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Correctness proof: The function should return the correct projection by ignoring embedded fields with optional keys
editorial.dryRun: Step-by-step example run: Traverse the input document, handle optional keys, and construct the output projection
commonMistakes: Mistake 1: Not handling optional keys properly
